reasoning: Methyl 2-methoxy-2-[1-oxo-2-(propenyl)amino]acetate is an ester of an alpha-amino acid derivative, featuring a methyl ester at the alpha-carbon with a methoxy substituent and an amide linkage (N-acyl group with an allylamino portion), best classified as an alpha amino acid ester. The compound contains a carboxylic acid ester at the alpha position relative to a nitrogen-bearing carbon.
